use_cases: Side navigation drawer for mobile-first responsive layouts
Product filters or cart slide-out panel for e-commerce sites
Settings or configuration panels in SaaS dashboards
Confirmation dialogs with styled action buttons
Mobile navigation menus and contextual action reveals
ai_summary: A flexible drawer component with multiple visual variants (primary, mono, destructive, secondary, outline, dashed, ghost, dim) that can function as both a drawer panel and styled button. Features smooth hover transitions, open/close state management via data-state attributes, and supports multiple appearance styles including outlined and ghost modes. Built with Radix UI primitives for accessibility and uses class-variance-authority for consistent variant styling. Designed for responsive layouts across desktop and mobile platforms, commonly used for navigation, filters, settings panels, and contextual actions.
